<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR does. -->

## Linked Issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — tooling/config, no runtime change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no feature change or bug fix
- [ ] `test` — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows `<type>/<issue#>-<slug>` convention
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits format
- [ ] `.editorconfig` rules respected (run your editor's formatter)
- [ ] Relevant tests added or updated
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] `Closes #N` is present in this description
- [ ] Project board issue moved to `In Review`
